airport.name: CSMIA Inspired International Airport
airport.design_note: Realistic terminal topology: passengers progress through landside -> security -> immigration -> airside -> gates, with arrivals on a separate flow. Every walkable edge runs purely N/S or E/W exactly one grid step so the keyboard navigator (forward/left/right) walks tile-by-tile.

zones.name: Landside (Public)
zones.description: Public, pre-security area where passengers arrive, find their airline, and check in. Free to enter and exit. After this you cross security and cannot return without re-screening.

zones.name: Security Transition
zones.description: The screening checkpoint. Passengers are scanned, bags are X-rayed, prohibited liquids are disposed. Crossing this is one-way unless you re-screen.

zones.name: Immigration (International Departures)
zones.description: Passport control and e-gates for international departures. Domestic passengers skip this zone.

zones.name: Airside Retail
zones.description: Duty-free, electronics, books, pharmacy, fashion. Open only to passengers who have cleared security.

zones.name: Airside Food Court
zones.description: Restaurants, cafes, food court, and central plaza. All airside.

zones.name: Airside Services
zones.description: Premium lounges, prayer room, family/nursing room, medical room, smoking lounge, info kiosk. All airside.

zones.name: Gate Piers
zones.description: Two branching piers (A west, B east) with gates A1-A10 and B1-B10. Each pier junction has water and charging.

zones.name: Arrival Hall
zones.description: Arrival immigration, baggage claim carousels, customs (green/red channels), arrival hall services, and ground transport. Separate from departures flow.

shops.name: Starbucks
shops.offers: Coffee, cold brew, and quick breakfast
shops.description: Global coffeehouse known for hand-crafted espresso, cold brew, and grab-and-go pastries. Mobile order pickup available.
shops.promotion: 20% off any handcrafted drink with boarding pass before 10 AM

shops.name: WHSmith
shops.description: Travel-focused bookstore stocking bestsellers, regional press, travel guides, neck pillows, eye masks, and last-minute charging cables.
shops.promotion: Buy any book, get 10% off a travel accessory

shops.name: Croma
shops.offers: Chargers, headphones, power banks, travel tech
shops.description: Indian consumer electronics chain - quick fixes for chargers, USB-C cables, travel adapters, headphones, and power banks. Brand warranty applied at checkout.
shops.promotion: 15% off power banks and travel adapters with boarding pass

shops.name: Fabindia
shops.offers: Ethnic wear, scarves, and Indian gifts
shops.description: Heritage Indian apparel and home goods - kurtas, dupattas, handloom scarves, organic cotton stoles, hand-block printed gifts.

shops.name: Apollo Pharmacy
shops.offers: Medicines, wellness kits, first-aid travel packs
shops.description: Trusted Indian pharmacy chain. Carries OTC medicines, prescription dispensing (with valid Rx), travel wellness kits, baby care, contact lens solution.
shops.promotion: Free BP check with any purchase

shops.name: Haldiram's
shops.offers: Indian snacks, sweets, meals, and packed gifts
shops.description: Iconic Indian QSR - thalis, chaat, samosas, dosas, biryani; pre-packed sweets, namkeen, and gift boxes for travel.

shops.name: Theobroma
shops.description: Mumbai-born patisserie - signature brownies, sandwiches, croissants, slow-drip coffee, and cakes-by-the-slice.

shops.name: Mumbai Duty Free
shops.offers: Perfume, liquor, chocolate, and travel exclusives
shops.description: Largest duty-free in T2 - international whiskies, premium gin, perfumes, designer chocolate, watches, and travel exclusives. Show boarding pass at entry.
shops.promotion: 20% off all luxury perfumes with boarding pass

shops.name: Forest Essentials
shops.offers: Luxury Ayurveda skincare and gift boxes
shops.description: Premium Indian Ayurveda house - face creams, oils, gift boxes; plant-based, GMP-certified, and travel-size kits.
shops.promotion: Complimentary Kumkumadi sample with any ₹2000+ purchase

shops.name: Chumbak
shops.description: Quirky India-inspired lifestyle brand - mugs, magnets, totes, notebooks, phone cases. Great last-mile gifting for travelers.

shops.name: Hamleys
shops.offers: Toys, kids gifts, and activity kits
shops.description: London-origin toy store. Soft toys, building kits, board games, kids activity packs, and travel-sized fidgets. Family-friendly seating outside.
shops.promotion: 10% off any soft toy with kids' boarding pass

shops.name: Burger King
shops.description: Global QSR - flame-grilled Whoppers, vegetarian Whopper, fries, soft drinks. Self-serve kiosks available.
shops.promotion: Free upgrade to large fries with any combo

faq.answer: Visit the Information Desk at landside (InfoDesk_C) and your airline counter at Central Check-in Hub. They will help with airline records and refer you to the diplomatic office. Do NOT cross security yet.
If you are at T1 and need T2, exit landside and use the inter-terminal shuttle from outside the arrivals kerb. Information Desk can confirm.
Use a Self Check-in Kiosk (Kiosk_W or Kiosk_E) or speak to your airline at the Check-in islands. Kiosks accept walk-up bookings up to 60 minutes before departure.
Bag Drop counters (BagDrop_W or BagDrop_E) can weigh and accept oversized luggage. Excess fees may apply.
Accessibility Help desks at landside (AccessHelp_W or AccessHelp_E) provide wheelchair assistance, elderly help, and unaccompanied minor support. Pre-book if possible.
If you have already cleared security and lose your passport, go to the Service Hub airside (Service_Hub) and ask for airline staff. You may need to re-do immigration.
Multifaith Prayer Room is in the airside services row (PrayerRoom). Wudu facility and quiet space available. Wheelchair accessible.
Family Restroom & Nursery is in the airside services row (FamilyRoom). Includes baby changing and a private nursing room.
Medical Room (MedicalRoom) is in the airside services row. For emergencies, call airport medical via any service kiosk.
Smoking Lounge (SmokingLounge) is in the airside services row, east side. It is the only enclosed smoking area inside the terminal.
Apollo Pharmacy (Shop_Pharmacy) is in the airside retail row, west side. Open 24/7. Carries medicines, first-aid, and travel wellness kits.
Go directly to your gate. If the door is closed, the gate agent or any service kiosk can rebook you. Service Hub (Service_Hub) is the central airside help point.
Check the flight info displays at Plaza Hub or the Service Hub. Walking time between piers via the airside services row is 4-6 minutes.
Lost baggage office is at Baggage Carousel 1 (Baggage_1) in the arrival hall. Bring your boarding pass and bag tag.
Taxi & Rideshare (Taxi_Stand), Hotel Shuttle (Hotel_Shuttle), Metro (Metro_Connection), and Bus stand are at the south end of the arrival hall.
Currency Exchange & ATM (Currency_Exchange) is in the arrival hall, central area.
SIM Card & Connectivity kiosk (SIM_Kiosk) is in the arrival hall east. They sell tourist SIMs and help with airport WiFi.

Live wait time depends on lane. Family lanes (Sec_Lane_T1_F, Sec_Lane_T2_F) are usually faster for travelers with children. Priority lanes (Sec_Lane_T1_1, Sec_Lane_T2_1) are open to business class. Average wait: 8-15 minutes.
Liquids over 100ml must be checked in or disposed at the Liquid Disposal bins (LiquidDisposal_W or LiquidDisposal_E) just past security. Medicines and baby food are exempt; declare at the lane.
Pet travel is handled at Check-in Island T2-B (CheckIn_T2_B). Required: airline-approved carrier, vaccination records, and a vet certificate.
